description: MCP server for Monarch Money — account, transaction, and budget management.
name: com.pulsemcp/monarch-money

environmentVariables.description: Pre-obtained session token for authentication (recommended over email/password).
environmentVariables.name: MONARCH_SESSION_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: TOTP code if 2FA is enabled on the account.
environmentVariables.name: MONARCH_TOTP

environmentVariables.description: Email OTP code required only on first login from a new install.
environmentVariables.name: MONARCH_EMAIL_OTP

environmentVariables.description: Override passphrase for encrypting the on-disk session file.
environmentVariables.name: MONARCH_SESSION_PASSPHRASE

environmentVariables.description: Directory where session.enc file is stored.
environmentVariables.name: MONARCH_STATE_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of tool groups to enable (readonly, manage).
environmentVariables.name: MONARCH_ENABLED_TOOL_GROUPS

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated whitelist of specific tool names to enable.
environmentVariables.name: MONARCH_ENABLED_TOOLS

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated blacklist of specific tool names to disable.
environmentVariables.name: MONARCH_DISABLED_TOOLS
